{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315004012212AF54C22079CE948"}"},"total":499},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7447027670865167129","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺不错的，里面的剧情经得起一定的推敲，跟历史上的很多人物事件和地理位置都能对得上，可以说是历史+新意，主角有金手指但不是全靠金手指，还是值得一看的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733903241,"group_id":"7422264112098315289","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"脑洞奇奇怪怪，天马行空，不要在意逻辑","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6LxQBVIoPrVznXzgYXniLRDSTuaW6up/BVMWAhgf/TY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f5e38799ee934991a04a31667d5fef3d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791294&x-signature=g1c1SW%2BehB5NRL9UIQ%2BxymRBSkI%3D","user_id":"1843250166512270","user_name":"琉璃菱心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1843250166512270","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7422264112098315289","book_info":{"abstract":"【20岁，你从杭州特训班毕业，加入特务处，成为一名特务】
【22岁，你拒绝了76号女特务头子的暗示，失去了一次走捷径的机会】
【25岁，随着军统上海站遭到毁灭性打击，你迅速上位，成为情报组组长】
【28岁，你不断努力，成了上海站副站长，并且成了一名地下党】
【30岁，你不通人情世故，遭到内部倾轧，被调到了广西站】
【32岁，你身处偏僻之地，郁郁不得志，最终随国军一起大撤退】
【40岁，你受到国家唤醒，然而此时你人轻言微，还能发挥作用吗？】
【特务逆袭系统绑定中……】
“不是哥们，我才20岁，老登系统什么鬼？”许敬元沉默了许久。
“让我一个刚穿越来的人，去完成这种任务，你不是开玩笑吧？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/aa44661b721e5d05c9741611b82fe70c","author":"刑不可知","author_id":"","book_id":"7422264112098315289","book_name":"我明明是特务，你却叫我同志？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":507,"name":"谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=507&name=谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7422264191173526041","read_count":"17152","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"853527"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"407","tags":"抗战谍战,都市,系统,穿越,谍战,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/57fcf9325b4252e814c67104d56ed6a6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433240&x-signature=1GhacyLJmmUbuBP3IS7GUZxJA8Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3360551670395156","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"142"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315004012212AF54C22079CE948"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"li
